languages.text: "Вокс-сигнал утерян! Какая же там была литания для этого?.."
"Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"
languages.original_text: "Вокс-сигнал утерян! Какая же там была литания для этого?.."

traits.locale_text: "Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"
"Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"
"Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"
"Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"

languages.text: “音阵信号中断！这时候该念哪段祷文来着？”
languages.original_text: "Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"

traits.locale_text: “音阵信号中断！这时候该念哪段祷文来着？”

languages.text: "Voks sinyali kayboldu! Bu durumda hangi ilahiyi okuyorduk?"
languages.original_text: "Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"

traits.locale_text: "Voks sinyali kayboldu! Bu durumda hangi ilahiyi okuyorduk?"

languages.text: « Signal-vox perdu ! Quelle litanie faut-il utiliser dans ces cas-là, déjà ? »
languages.original_text: "Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"

traits.locale_text: « Signal-vox perdu ! Quelle litanie faut-il utiliser dans ces cas-là, déjà ? »

languages.text: «¡Señal de voco perdida! A ver, ¿cuál era la letanía?...».
languages.original_text: "Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Señal de voco perdida! A ver, ¿cuál era la letanía?...».

languages.text: "Voxsignal verloren! Und? Was ist die Litanei hierfür?"
languages.original_text: "Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"

traits.locale_text: "Voxsignal verloren! Und? Was ist die Litanei hierfür?"

languages.text: 「ヴォックス信号が途絶えた！ さて、これに使う連祷は何だったか？」
languages.original_text: "Vox-signal lost! Now, what was the litany for this?"

traits.locale_text: 「ヴォックス信号が途絶えた！ さて、これに使う連祷は何だったか？」
